# Drift Canary Third-Party Notices

This directory vendors a fixed 50-item canary subset for `inferock-drift-canary-v1`.

## GSM8K-Platinum

- Source: https://huggingface.co/datasets/madrylab/gsm8k-platinum
- Data slice: rows API `config=main`, `split=test`, `offset=0`, `length=25`
- License declared by the Hugging Face dataset card: MIT

## MMLU / hendrycks-test

- Source repository: https://github.com/hendrycks/test
- Data archive: https://people.eecs.berkeley.edu/~hendrycks/data.tar
- Data slice: first row from each of the first 25 alphabetically sorted `data/test/*_test.csv` subjects
- License: MIT

Copyright (c) 2020 Dan Hendrycks

## openai/simple-evals

- Source: https://github.com/openai/simple-evals
- Use: exact-match extraction pattern attribution only; no code copied
- License: MIT
